response.body: {"serviceJhList":[{"image":"data:image/png;base64,","name":"返済手続きに関するご案内","imageList":[{"image":"data:image/png;base64,","name":"をお借入れの方","type":"URL","value":"https://www.flat35.com/user/","flex":"1"},{"image":"data:image/png;base64,","name":"以外をお借入れの方","type":"URL","value":"https://www.jhf.go.jp/hensai/index.html","flex":"1"}]},{"image":"data:image/png;base64,","name":"各種制度","imageList":[{"image":"data:image/png;base64,","name":"","type":"URL","value":"https://www.jhf.go.jp/kojin/grl/grlweb.html","flex":"2","hasBorder":true},{"image":"data:image/png;base64,","name":"","type":"URL","value":"https://www.jhf.go.jp/fukkou/saigai/web.html","flex":"2","hasBorder":true}]},{"image":"data:image/png;base64,","name":"〈マンション管理組合の方向け！〉\n修繕積立金の計画的な積立てをサポート","imageList":[{"image":"data:image/png;base64,","name":"","type":"URL","value":"https://www.jhf.go.jp/kanri/smile/index.html","flex":"2"}]},{"image":"data:image/png;base64,","name":"ポイント申請","imageList":[{"image":"data:image/png;base64,","name":"","type":"URL","value":"https://www.flat35.com/lp/tokuten/","flex":"2","message":"※2026年10月1日以後に【フラット３５】をお借入れされた方が対象となります。"}]},{"image":"data:image/png;base64,","name":"家計簿アプリ","imageList":[{"image":"data:image/png;base64,","name":"","type":"URL","value":"https://personal-finance.rakuten.co.jp","flex":"1"},{"image":"data:image/png;base64,","name":"","type":"URL","value":"https://moneyforward.com/me","flex":"1"}]},{"image":"data:image/png;base64,","name":"機構情報","imageList":[{"image":"data:image/png;base64,","name":"","type":"URL","value":"https://www.jhf.go.jp/index.html","flex":"1"},{"image":"data:image/png;base64,","name":"","type":"URL","value":"https://www.flat35.com/index.html","flex":"1"}]},{"image":"data:image/png;base64,","name":"設定","imageList":[{"image":"data:image/png;base64,","name":"生体認証登録","type":"exce_a","value":"","flex":"2"}]}]}
